## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] New stdlib stages have at least one `example` in the spec
- [ ] Public functions have doc comments
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if architecture or CLI commands changed
